description: The merchandising team needs to add structured 'Brand' and 'Weight' data to products. Extend the product data model by creating a 'Brands' taxonomy vocabulary (machine name: brands) containing terms for Sony, Apple, Samsung, Logitech, and Bose. Add a 'Brand' entity reference field (machine name: field_brand, limit 1) and a 'Weight' decimal number field (machine name: field_weight, precision 10, scale 3, suffix 'kg', limit 1) to the 'Default' product type. Update the following products with their respective Brand and Weight values: Sony WH-1000XM5 (Sony, 0.250), Apple AirPods Pro (Apple, 0.051), Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro (Samsung, 0.057), Logitech MX Master 3S (Logitech, 0.141), and Bose QuietComfort 45 (Bose, 0.240). Drupal admin credentials: admin / Admin1234!.
